text.tspan: OUT OF SCOPE for component test

g.text: IN SCOPE for component test of ORDERS service
TEST RUNNER (uses ONLY the service's public API)

text.tspan: u2022 Tests the REAL service code: routes, serialization,
u2022 Tests the FULL request lifecycle end-to-end inside the service
u2022 Each service has its own component-test suite
u2022 Catches bugs unit tests can't (framework misconfig,
DIFFERENCE FROM UNIT TEST: full service is real.
DIFFERENCE FROM INTEGRATION TEST: external dependencies stubbed.
DIFFERENCE FROM E2E: only ONE service tested at a time.

g.text: Customer svc | Inventory svc | Shipping svc | Stripe
